category.scope_note: Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, LoRa, and IoT wireless device compliance for China-to-Bahrain export under TRA Bahrain type approval and GCC/GSO regulatory frameworks.

title.en: China-to-Bahrain Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix (TRA Type Approval / GCC)
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入巴林：TRA型号认证与GCC合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入巴林：TRA型號認證與GCC合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, LoRa, and IoT device documentation against Bahrain TRA mandatory type approval, GCC/GSO telecommunications technical regulations (EMC and product conformity), electrical safety to IEC 62368-1 (230 V / 50 Hz / Type G), authorized local importer and TRA agent registration requirements, and Bahrain cybersecurity obligations under the Personal Data Protection Law (PDPL) and FinCIRT framework.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国Wi-Fi、蓝牙、LoRa及物联网设备文件与巴林TRA强制型号认证、GCC/GSO电信技术法规（EMC及产品合规）、IEC 62368-1电气安全（230 V / 50 Hz / G型插头）、授权本地进口商及TRA代理商注册要求，以及巴林《个人数据保护法》（PDPL）和FinCIRT网络安全义务的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國Wi-Fi、藍牙、LoRa及物聯網裝置文件與巴林TRA強制型號認證、GCC/GSO電信技術法規（EMC及產品合規）、IEC 62368-1電氣安全（230 V / 50 Hz / G型插頭）、授權本地進口商及TRA代理商註冊要求，以及巴林《個人資料保護法》（PDPL）和FinCIRT網路安全義務的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, TRA Bahrain type approval, GSO determination, legal opinion, customs ruling, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and device manufacturers should verify current Bahrain telecommunications law, TRA Bahrain type approval procedures, applicable GCC/GSO technical regulations, and related requirements with qualified regulatory professionals before import or sale in Bahrain.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、巴林TRA型号认证、GSO裁定、法律意见、海关裁决或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和设备制造商在进口或于巴林销售前，应与合格监管专业人士核验现行巴林电信法律、巴林TRA型号认证程序、适用的GCC/GSO技术法规及相关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、巴林TRA型號認證、GSO裁定、法律意見、海關裁決或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和設備製造商在進口或於巴林銷售前，應與合格監管專業人士核驗現行巴林電信法律、巴林TRA型號認證程序、適用的GCC/GSO技術法規及相關要求。

answer_first.en: The main Bahrain gaps for a China-made Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, or IoT wireless device are: (1) TRA Bahrain mandatory type approval — TRA Bahrain mark and approval number must appear on the device and packaging before import or sale; (2) EMC testing to ETSI EN 301 489 series (or GSO-adopted equivalents) submitted as part of the TRA Bahrain type approval application; (3) GCC/GSO product conformity requirements for regulated consumer electronics categories under GSO Technical Regulations; (4) electrical safety to IEC 62368-1 at 230 V / 50 Hz / Type G (BS 1363) plug — the standard mains supply in Bahrain; (5) a locally registered importer or TRA-registered agent in Bahrain; and (6) awareness of Bahrain cybersecurity obligations under the PDPL (connected services handling personal data) and FinCIRT (financial-sector deployments). Chinese SRRC approval and CCC certification are not recognized by TRA Bahrain. The GCC Mutual Recognition Arrangement covers recognition only among GCC member states and does not extend to Chinese, EU, or US approvals.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝或物联网无线设备进入巴林的主要差距为：(1) 巴林TRA强制型号认证 — 进口或销售前须在设备和包装上标注巴林TRA标志及审批号；(2) 作为巴林TRA型号认证申请一部分提交的ETSI EN 301 489系列（或GSO采纳的等效标准）EMC测试；(3) GSO技术法规下受监管消费类电子产品的GCC/GSO产品合规要求；(4) 巴林标准市电下的IEC 62368-1电气安全（230 V / 50 Hz / G型BS 1363插头）；(5) 巴林本地注册进口商或TRA注册代理商；以及(6) 了解巴林《个人数据保护法》（PDPL，涉及处理个人数据的联网服务）和FinCIRT（金融部门部署）下的网络安全义务。中国SRRC批准和CCC认证不被巴林TRA承认。GCC相互承认协议仅覆盖GCC成员国之间的相互承认，不延伸至中国、欧盟或美国的批准。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩或物聯網無線裝置進入巴林的主要差距為：(1) 巴林TRA強制型號認證 — 進口或銷售前須在裝置和包裝上標注巴林TRA標誌及審批號；(2) 作為巴林TRA型號認證申請一部分提交的ETSI EN 301 489系列（或GSO採納的等效標準）EMC測試；(3) GSO技術法規下受監管消費類電子產品的GCC/GSO產品合規要求；(4) 巴林標準市電下的IEC 62368-1電氣安全（230 V / 50 Hz / G型BS 1363插頭）；(5) 巴林本地註冊進口商或TRA註冊代理商；以及(6) 了解巴林《個人資料保護法》（PDPL，涉及處理個人資料的聯網服務）和FinCIRT（金融部門部署）下的網路安全義務。中國SRRC批准和CCC認證不被巴林TRA承認。GCC相互承認協議僅涵蓋GCC成員國之間的相互承認，不延伸至中國、歐盟或美國的批准。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly or upon TRA Bahrain / GSO regulatory change
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true.
